company_name: Korea Commercial Act treasury-share cancellation reform
notes: Policy can support R6 rerating background, but individual companies still need executed cancellation, dividends, ROE, and capital quality.

company_name: Korea dividend tax and shareholder-protection reform
notes: Dividend tax reform is a market-level Stage 1/2 catalyst; company-level rerating still requires return execution.

company_name: SK Square buyback cancellation and governance improvement
notes: NAV discount plus actual cancellation and governance improvement is a higher-quality holding-company value-up case.
Buyback can support price, but business competitiveness and EPS path remain separate gates.

company_name: Korean bank and financial holding value-up rerating
notes: Banks and financial holdings are Green-eligible only after ROE, CET1, credit cost, and shareholder return execution are verified.
User count is routing context; payment volume, take rate, financial attach, credit loss, and FCF must be checked.

company_name: Toss global expansion and won stablecoin watch
notes: Toss payment fintech may be a success candidate, but won stablecoin remains Watch before regulation, volume, and fee model.
Round document gives a year but no exact date; no stage date is invented.

company_name: Korea Zinc buyback and control premium event
notes: Buybacks and tenders must be separated into shareholder-return execution versus control-premium event risk.
Tax policy shock can break brokerage and value-up momentum through trading-value and sentiment pressure.
The document gives a broad 2022~2025 window, so no exact stage date is invented.

company_name: Bank of England stablecoin convertibility warning
notes: Even fiat-backed stablecoin exposure needs reserve, redemption, liquidity, and regulatory proof.
